rules.name: global_fit
rules.notes: Everything fits; both tensors stay on chip simultaneously.

rules.name: residual
rules.notes: Skip tensor held in cache; x_residual + xout use 4 banks (2 xout, 2 x_residual), xout is written on xin.

rules.name: conv_output_dominated
rules.notes: xout is the larger tensor; xin is written onto xout's space. 1 bank overhead for read/write pipeline boundary.

rules.name: conv_input_dominated
rules.notes: xin is the larger tensor; xout is written onto xin's space. 1 bank overhead for read/write pipeline boundary.

rules.name: pool
rules.notes: No weights; output stays on chip. Shows size reduction from spatial downsampling.

rules.name: stream_xin_keep_xout
rules.notes: xin streams from external (prev layer evicted); xout still kept on chip.

rules.name: fallback
rules.notes: Full streaming: xin and xout both via external memory → output marked QUANTIZE.

rules.name: linear_stream_xout
rules.notes: xin in cache, weights streamed in, xout is computed and streamed out.

rules.name: conv_stream_xin_out
rules.notes: xin from cache, weights resident, xout streamed to external.
